Module 6 - Lesson 5
Key Elements Of Transaction Maximization Pages:
Applies To:!
•The Reverse Add-On Offer Page!
•The Soft Add-On Offer Page!
•The Mid-Tier Add-On Offer Page!
!
Does 	NOT 	Apply To The Thank You “Gift Offer” Page

-- 1 of 8 --

Module 6 - Lesson 5
Key Elements Of Transaction Maximization Pages:
•Maintains Continuity Of “Branding”!
•Conveys Transaction Is Still In Progress!
•Acknowledges Continuance Of Order!
•Displays Checkout Progress Status!
•Tells Customer Product Details Will Be Sent To
Them Via Email In 10-Minutes (Psychology)!
•Highlights Special Offer!
•VSL (with CTA Area) Or Short-Form Sales Letter

-- 2 of 8 --

Module 6 - Lesson 5
Key Elements Of Transaction Maximization Pages:
MISSING: Tells Customer Product Details Will Be Sent To Them Via Email In
10-Minutes?
